description: Original tasks before rewriting based on actual data

tasks.name: Book the most affordable 3-day meditation retreat next month with a private room and vegetarian meals
tasks.description: Find a 3-day meditation retreat scheduled for next calendar month, with a private room and vegetarian meals, and complete the booking process for the cheapest option that matches these criteria.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click on the “Retreats” option in the main navigation menu.
On the Retreats page, click the “Retreat Type” filter and select the “Meditation” checkbox.
Open the date range picker and set the start date to the first day of next month and the end date to the last day of next month.
In the “Duration” filter, select the option for “3 days”.
In the “Room Type” filter, select the “Private room” option.
In the “Meals” filter, select the “Vegetarian” option.
Open the “Sort by” dropdown and select “Price: Low to High”.
Click on the first retreat card in the filtered and sorted results list (the cheapest matching retreat).

On the retreat detail page, click the “Book Now” button, choose any available start date within next month, confirm the 3-day stay and private room option, enter your name, email, and phone number in the booking form fields, and click the “Confirm Booking (No Payment Yet)” button.

tasks.name: Enroll in the highest-rated beginner mystery school course under $300 starting within 14 days
tasks.description: Locate beginner-level mystery school courses, filter for start dates within the next 14 days and prices under $300, sort by rating, and enroll in the highest-rated course that meets these criteria using the standard enrollment option.
steps: From any page, click on the “Mystery School” or “Online Courses” item in the main navigation.
On the courses page, click the “Level” filter and select the “Beginner” checkbox.
Open the “Start Date” filter and set the range from today to 14 days from today.
In the “Price” or “Tuition” filter, set the maximum price to 300 dollars.
In the “Features” filter, select the checkbox for “Includes live Q&A sessions” if it is available.
Open the “Sort by” dropdown and select “Rating: High to Low”.
Click on the first course card in the list (the highest-rated course that matches the filters).
On the course detail page, click the “Enroll Now” or “Join Course” button.

In the enrollment options, select the “Standard” or lowest-priced enrollment tier (not any premium or VIP tier) and then fill in the name and email fields and click the “Complete Enrollment” or “Confirm Enrollment” button.

tasks.name: Book a 60-minute 1:1 mentoring session with the more experienced of two mentors under $120 on next Friday evening
tasks.description: Compare the first two mentors offering 60-minute 1:1 spiritual mentoring sessions under $120, choose the mentor with more years of experience, and book a 60-minute session on the next Friday between 4:00 pm and 7:00 pm.
steps: Navigate to the homepage and click on the “1:1 Mentoring” or “Mentors” link in the main navigation.
On the mentoring page, open the “Session Length” filter and select the “60 minutes” option.
In the “Price” or “Rate” filter, set the maximum price to 120 dollars.
Locate the first two mentor cards in the filtered list and open each one in a new tab by clicking their names or profile images (so you have two mentor profile pages open).
On the first mentor’s profile tab, scroll to the “Experience” section and note the number of years of experience shown (for example, “12 years of teaching”).
Switch to the second mentor’s profile tab, scroll to the same “Experience” section, and note the number of years of experience shown there.
Choose the mentor profile tab that shows the higher number of years of experience and stay on that mentor’s page.
On the chosen mentor’s page, locate the session options and select the “60-minute session” option under the available services.
Open the date picker, navigate to the next Friday on the calendar, select that date, and then pick any available time slot between 4:00 pm and 7:00 pm.
Click the “Book Session” or “Confirm Appointment” button, then fill in your name and email in the booking form fields and click the final “Confirm Booking” button.

tasks.name: Customize a 5-day retreat by adding three workshops under $50 each, including Sound Healing
tasks.description: Use the retreat builder to create a 5-day stay and add exactly three optional workshops that each cost under $50, making sure one of them is a Sound Healing workshop, then finalize the custom retreat package.
steps: From the homepage, click on the “Custom Retreat” or “Design Your Retreat” option in the main navigation or from a prominent button.
On the retreat builder, set the retreat length to “5 days” using the duration selector or plus/minus controls.
Choose any available start date in the upcoming month using the date picker and confirm the 5-day range.
Select a mid-range room type (for example, choose “Standard private room” instead of the cheapest or most premium option) from the room options list.
Scroll to the “Add Workshops” or “Optional Activities” section and apply a price filter to show only workshops costing 50 dollars or less.
In the filtered workshops list, locate a workshop with “Sound Healing” in its title and click the “Add” or “+” button to include it in your retreat.
From the remaining workshops under 50 dollars, select two additional workshops by clicking their “Add” buttons, prioritizing the two cheapest options you see.
Scroll to the retreat summary panel and confirm that exactly three workshops are listed in the add-ons section by counting them.
Click the “Continue” or “Next” button to proceed to the booking details, fill in your name and email in the required fields, and click the “Save Custom Retreat” or “Confirm Package” button.

tasks.name: Purchase three spiritual shop items: cushion under $60, journal under $25, and incense rated 4+ stars
tasks.description: In the online shop, add to the cart one meditation cushion priced under $60, one journal priced under $25, and one incense product with a rating of at least 4 stars, then review the cart with exactly these three items.
steps: Click on the “Shop” or “Store” option in the main navigation to open the online shop.
In the shop categories sidebar, click on the “Meditation Gear” or similar category that includes cushions.
Use the price filter to set the maximum price to 60 dollars, then scroll through the results and click on the first meditation cushion product card that is shown.
On the cushion product page, ensure the price shown is 60 dollars or less, then select any available color or size from the dropdown menus and click the “Add to Cart” button.
Navigate back to the shop using the breadcrumb or main navigation, then select the “Journals” or “Notebooks” category.
Set the price filter maximum to 25 dollars and click on the first journal product card that appears within this range.
On the journal product page, choose any cover design or page style option if available, and click the “Add to Cart” button.
Return to the shop again and select the “Incense & Scents” or similar category.
In the incense category, apply a rating filter to show products with a rating of at least 4 stars, then click on the first incense product card in the filtered list.

On the incense product page, make sure the quantity is set to 1 and click the “Add to Cart” button, then click on the “Cart” or “View Cart” link in the header to open the cart page with the three selected items.

tasks.name: Register for a free weekday evening community event this month with more than 20 spots left
tasks.description: Use the events calendar to find a free community event happening on a weekday evening (after 6:00 pm) within the current month that still shows more than 20 spots remaining, and complete the registration form for that event.
steps: From the homepage, click on the “Events” or “Calendar” link in the main navigation.
On the events page, use the month selector to ensure the calendar is showing the current month.
Apply the “Event Type” filter and select the “Community” or “Community Circle” option.
In the “Price” filter, select the “Free” checkbox to show only free events.

Scroll through the list or calendar for the current month and click on an event that is scheduled on a weekday (Monday to Friday) with a start time later than 6:00 pm and shows more than 20 spots remaining (for example, a label like “25 spots left”).
On the event detail page, click the “Register” or “RSVP” button.
In the registration form, fill in your name, email, and select the number of attendees as “1” from the quantity or attendees dropdown.
If there is a communication preference section, select “SMS reminder” or “Text message” as your preferred reminder method, then click the “Submit Registration” or “Confirm RSVP” button.

tasks.name: Create a 3-item bedtime practice playlist with guided meditations about sleep under 20 minutes and rating 4.5+
tasks.description: In the resources or media library, find guided meditation audios about sleep or rest that are 10–20 minutes long and rated at least 4.5 stars, and add exactly three of them to a personal bedtime playlist.
steps: Click on the “Resources”, “Library”, or “Meditations” link in the main navigation to open the media library.
In the library filters, select the content type “Audio” and the category or tag “Sleep” or “Rest”.
Open the duration filter and set the minimum length to 10 minutes and the maximum length to 20 minutes.
In the rating filter, set the minimum rating to 4.5 stars.

Scroll through the filtered list and click on the first guided meditation item to open its detail panel, then click the “Add to Playlist” button and choose or create a playlist named “Bedtime Practice”.
Return to the filtered list, click on the second guided meditation item, and again click “Add to Playlist”, selecting the same “Bedtime Practice” playlist.
Repeat the process for a third different guided meditation item from the same filtered list, adding it to the “Bedtime Practice” playlist.
After adding the three items, click on the “Playlists” or “My Playlists” link in the library interface and then open the “Bedtime Practice” playlist to view the three selected meditations.

tasks.name: Ask about wheelchair access and dairy-free meals after searching the FAQ for accessibility info
tasks.description: First search the FAQ for information about accessibility and diet using the keyword 'wheelchair', then use the contact form to send a message asking specifically about wheelchair access and dairy-free meal options for retreats, selecting the appropriate topic.
steps: From any page, scroll to the footer or use the main navigation to click on the “Help”, “Support”, or “FAQ” link.
On the FAQ page, click into the FAQ search bar and type the word “wheelchair”, then press Enter or click the search icon to run the search.
Scroll through the first page of FAQ results and expand at least one relevant question by clicking on its title.
After reviewing the FAQ, click on the “Contact Us” or “Still need help?” button or link to open the contact form page.
In the contact form, open the “Topic” or “Reason for contact” dropdown and select the option labeled “Accessibility & Dietary Needs” or the closest matching option.
Fill in the name and email fields with your details, and if there is a phone number field, enter a phone number as well.
In the message text area, type a message that explicitly asks about wheelchair accessibility for retreat spaces and dairy-free meal options during retreats.
If a preferred contact method section is present, select “Phone call” or “Phone” as the preferred method, then click the “Send Message” or “Submit” button to send the inquiry.
